name: Sabina Gold & Silver Corp.
description: Sabina Gold & Silver Corp. was a Canadian precious metals company focused on the exploration and development of high-grade gold assets, most notably the Back River Gold Project in Nunavut, Canada. The company was dedicated to responsible mining practices and sustainable development in the Arctic region. In 2023, Sabina Gold & Silver Corp. was acquired by B2Gold Corp., a senior gold producer, in a transaction that integrated Sabina's significant gold resources into B2Gold's international portfolio, marking a major consolidation in the Canadian mining sector.
